notes: Rows marked needsDocumentCheck have null clientName or an uncertain tender number and should be reviewed before database import.
A-WS-03-2026 appears twice: original water meters tender and later erratum/revised pricing. The database tender_number is unique, so import handling must merge/update or rename the erratum record.
Closing dates were stored as submissionDate because the tender schema uses submission_date for the deadline.
